title: Chemical Plant Explosion
description: A chemical plant explosion releases toxic fumes into nearby neighborhoods.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Evacuation is non-negotiable. Toxic fumes kill quickly and unpredictably.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: People deserve the right to choose. Forced evacuation is authoritarian.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: This isn’t ideology — it’s cost. Medical fallout is expensive.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Cost is irrelevant if people die.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Autonomy doesn’t pay hospital bills or rebuild neighborhoods.
